text: Newly constructed ranch designed house featuring: a living room with a vaulted ceiling, three bedrooms, three full bathrooms, an office, a large covered patio, a covered porch, a three-car garage, a large out building, and a view of the retention pond on the neighboring property.

Newly constructed ranch designed house featuring: a living room with a vaulted ceiling, three bedrooms, three full bathrooms, an office, a large covered patio, a covered porch, a three-car garage, a large outbuilding, and a view of a retention pond on the neighboring property.

Newly constructed ranch designed house featuring: a living room with a vaulted ceiling, three bedrooms, three full bathrooms, an office, a large covered patio, a covered porch, a three-car garage, a large out building, and a view of the retention pond on the neighboring property.

The subject is a detatched bungalow featuring: three bedrooms, one above grade bathroom, an unfinished basement with a bathroom and kitchen, a covered porch, an enclosed porch, a backyard deck, a detatched two-car garage, a chicken coop, a shed, and a 32'x48' barn with storage area, stables, electricity, and fenced pasture area.

The subject features three bedrooms, two bathrooms, an enclosed porch, patio, one-car attached garage, large detatched two-car garage/workshop with concrete floors, electricity, and loft storage, and an unfinished basement.

3 Bedroom 1 bathroom, 2 Car detached Garage with fenced in back yard. Original hardwood floors in the Living room, hall and 2 bedrooms. New floor coverings in all other rooms. Remodeled full bathroom & kitchen. Kitchen has butcher block countertops and all appliances to remain (frig, stove, microwave, dishwasher). Mud room/laundry room.

The subject features five bedrooms, three-and-a-half bathrooms, living room fireplace, second floor bedrooms fireplace, recently constructed main floor addition with a den, bedroom, and full bathroom, attached three car garage, fenced-in backyard, and deck.

The subject features three bedrooms, two full bathrooms, a finished basement family room, attached two car garage, backyard shed, and detatched one car garage that has been given limited contributory value due to its age and condition. The unfinished basement area has a toilet, but due to its limited utility it has been given no consideration in the estimation of value.

The subject has been recently renovated and features two above grade bedrooms, one above grade bathroom, covered porch, deck, and backyard shed. Since the subject's previous sale in 10/2024, recent updates include: new flooring installation throughout entire home. Replacement of drywall in approximately 50% of the interior. The plumbing system has been updated. Electrical wiring has been replaced. A new central air conditioning unit has been installed. The kitchen has been remodeled with new cabinets, countertops, appliances, and plumbing. The bathroom has been updated with a new vanity, toilet, flooring, and plumbing. Additional improvements include a new water heater, new washer and dryer, updated light fixtures throughout, and small deck constructed on the northside of the property. Renovation information has been supplied by the seller.  Underwriter Conditions  Appraiser to give detailed list of repairs/ updates completed to property since 10/2024 purchase by seller to support reason for large increase since prior sale of $35k 10/2024.  - The appraisal report has been updated to include a list of updates/renovations made to the property since its previous sale in 10/2024 that have been considered in the estimate of market value. The following statement has been added, "Since the subject's previous sale in 10/2024, recent updates include: new flooring installation throughout entire home. Replacement of drywall in approximately 50% of the interior. The plumbing system has been updated. Electrical wiring has been replaced. A new central air conditioning unit has been installed. The kitchen has been remodeled with new cabinets, countertops, appliances, and plumbing. The bathroom has been updated with a new vanity, toilet, flooring, and plumbing. Additional improvements include a new water heater, new washer and dryer, updated light fixtures throughout, and small deck constructed on the northside of the property. Update/renovation information has been supplied by the seller." The included list of updates made to the subject since the time of its previous sale demonstrate significant improvements to its marketability and support a value increase based on similarly renovated comparables included in this report.
The subject features three above grade bedrooms, two-and-a-half above grade bathrooms, finished basement family room, den, and bathroom, two-car garage, a backyard patio, and a living room fireplace.

The subject is modular ranch designed house on a well ventilated crawl space and features two bedrooms, one-and-a-half bathrooms, enclosed porch, deck, large pole frame shed, and livestock barn with significant physical depreciation.

The subject features four bedrooms, three full bathrooms, living room with high ceilings and a fireplace, large family room with fireplace and wet bar, two attached garages, one detatched three-car garage, large enclosed porch with fireplace, and access to Lake Decatur with covered boat storage and dock.

The subject has been recently renovated with new vinyl siding, flooring, repainted walls, windows, AC unit, kitchen appliances, washer/dryer, and roof. It features three above grade bedrooms, one bathroom, a partial unfinished basement, and enclosed porch.

The subject has been recently constructed and features four above grade bedrooms, two-and-a-half above grade bathrooms, living room with high ceilings and fireplace, finished basement family room, den, bedroom, bathroom, attached three car garage, and patio.

The subject has been recently constructed and features four above grade bedrooms, two-and-a-half above grade bathrooms, great room with high ceilings and fireplace, finished basement family room, den, bedroom, and bathroom, attached three car garage, patio, and fenced-in yard.

The subject features five above grade bedrooms, four-and-a-half above grade bathrooms, four fireplaces, partial finished basement family room, den, and recreation room, large enclosed porch, deck, attached two car garage, detatched one-car garage, and an additional detached two-car garage.

The subject features three above grade bedrooms, one above grade bathroom, finished walkout basement with family room, den, wet bar, bedroom, and half bathroom, attached two-car garage, 18'x36' in-ground pool, fenced-in yard, and patio. According to the owner, the pool has recently had its liner and safety drain replaced.

The subject features three above grade bedrooms, two-and-a-half above grade bathrooms, living room fireplace, finished walkout basement with family room, den, bedroom, and bathroom, attached two-car garage, deck, patio, and shed.

The subject has been recently renovated with new flooring, interior paint, light fixtures, kitchen cabinetry, appliances, and bathroom fixtures. It features four above grade bedrooms, one above grade bathroom, and detached one-car garage.

Cape Cod designed house on 16.74 acres. Covered porch, deck, Inground pool, pool house, large barn, large garage, work shop with office and bathroom, finished walkout basement with wet bar, kitchen, family room, bathroom.

The subject features three above grade bedrooms, two above grade bathrooms, partial unfinished basement, detatched two car garage, and two patios. The subject's shed features significant physical deterioration due to its age and has, therefore, not been given consideration in the estimation of value.

The subject has been recently updated with new flooring, paint, siding repair, kitchen appliances, cabinetry, carpeting in garage attic, in-ground pool utilites, pasture fencing, reduction of barn stalls, replaced gravel driveway, and landscaping improvements. It features two above grade bedrooms, one above grade bathroom, walkout finished basement family room, kitchenette, and bathroom, in-ground pool, deck, patio, pool house, detatched two-car garage with partially finished attic, workshop with office and 1/2 bathroom, and livestock barn with fenced-in pasture.

The subject features three above grade bedrooms, two above grade bathrooms, a living room wood stove, basement finished recreation room with kitchen, basement bedroom, basement bathroom, two-car garage, fenced-in backyard with elaborate landscaping, patio, and deck.

The subject features three bedrooms, two bathrooms, an enclosed porch, unfinished basement, and two-car garage. The unfinished basement has a toilet and sink, but they are not enclosed nor appear to be functioning so they have been given no value.

The subject features three bedrooms, one above grade bathroom, a sunroom on the first floor, den connected to the owner's suite, basement recreation room, basement office, basement bathroom, deck, fenced-in yard, and detatched garage.

The subject is a bi-level townhouse designed condominium featuring three above grade bedrooms, one above grade bathroom, a basement family room, 1/2 bathroom, 2-car garage, deck, and patio with a view of the community park. The Appraiser has adhered to ANSI standards in measuring the subject property.

The subject features two above grade bedrooms, one above grade bathroom, full unfinished basement, attached two-car garage, enclosed porch, deck, patio, backyard pond, 30' x 48' Outbuilding with electricity & plumbing, shed with electricity, and two carports. The basement has a non-functional shower and a functional toilet, however, the unfinished room lacks a sink and has therefore not been considered a half bathroom. The outbuilding has a non-functional toilet and it has not been considered in the estimate of value.

The subject features three above grade bedrooms, two above grade bathrooms, a living room with fireplace, basement family room with fireplace, two basement bedrooms, a basement bathroom, fenced-in yard, deck, and two-car garage.

The subject has recently had its roof replaced and exterior repainted. It features two above grade bedrooms, two-and-a-half above grade bathrooms, living room fireplace, finished basement family room and den, attached two-car garage, and deck.

The subject has recently recieved remodeled bathrooms and kitchen, updated hardwood flooring in the dining room, has five above grade bedrooms, four above gradefull bathrooms, a living room fireplace, enclosed porch, patio, two-car attached garage, unfinished basement, and covered porch.

The subject features three bedrooms, two-and-a-half bathrooms, a living room with a fireplace, a family room with a fireplace, an enclosed porch, two patios, a deck, a golf course view in the backyard, and an attached 2-car garage.

The subject has been recently renovated with new flooring, interior paint, exterior siding, light fixtures, doors, kitchen cabinetry, appliances, and bathroom fixtures. It features three above grade bedrooms, one above grade bathroom, detached two-car garage, and shed.

The subject has been recently updated in 2025 with new wiring, GFA/CN, plumbing, and LVP flooring. It features two above grade bedrooms, one above grade bathroom, full unfinished basement, detached one-car garage and two-car garage.

The subject features a recently constructed addition onto the rear of the dwelling that includes a great room, bedroom, and full bathroom. In total the subject has three above grade bedrooms, two above grade bathrooms, partial finished basement with a family room, den, and fireplace. There is a toilet and shower in the basement. It appears that the toilet is functional, but the shower is not. There is a lack of necessary elements for this to be a bathroom and has not been considered in the estimate of value.
